prompt_text:
### Demographics: 76-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 14 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs; Occasional GI side effects (nausea/loose stool)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 63.2 kg; Height 169.5 cm; BMI 22.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 139/84 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 6.7%; 9 months ago 6.4%; 6 months ago 6.5%; 3 months ago 6.2%; current 5.9%), FPG (12 months ago 162mg/dL; 9 months ago 161mg/dL; 6 months ago 166mg/dL; 3 months ago 134mg/dL; current 132mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 60.1kg; 9 months ago 60.2kg; 6 months ago 59.9kg; 3 months ago 61.1kg; current 63.2kg), Height (12 months ago 169.5cm; 9 months ago 169.5cm; 6 months ago 169.5cm; 3 months ago 169.5cm; current 169.5cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 21.0kg/m²; current 22.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 139mmHg; 9 months ago 142mmHg; 6 months ago 141mmHg; 3 months ago 138mmHg; current 139mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 82mmHg; 9 months ago 83mmHg; 6 months ago 86mmHg; 3 months ago 86mmHg; current 84mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 22U/L; 9 months ago 28U/L; 6 months ago 30U/L; 3 months ago 29U/L; current 25U/L), AST (12 months ago 17U/L; 9 months ago 18U/L; 6 months ago 18U/L; 3 months ago 26U/L; current 22U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.3mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.3mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.4mg/dL; current 0.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 40mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 38mL/min/1.73m²; current 40mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 316mg/g; 9 months ago 226mg/g; 6 months ago 215mg/g; 3 months ago 191mg/g; current 199mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 75mg/dL; 9 months ago 76mg/dL; 6 months ago 80mg/dL; 3 months ago 76mg/dL; current 79mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 50mg/dL; 9 months ago 49mg/dL; 6 months ago 50mg/dL; 3 months ago 52mg/dL; current 51mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 133mg/dL; 9 months ago 115mg/dL; 6 months ago 114mg/dL; 3 months ago 131mg/dL; current 124mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.8g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.2g/dL; current 11.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.13 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
